title: Archive Settings

fields.label: Posts Archive Heading
fields.name: posts_archive_heading
fields.instructions: Override the h1 on the main posts index page. Leave blank to use the assigned Posts Page title.

fields.label: Organisations Archive Heading
fields.name: organisation_archive_heading
fields.instructions: Override the h1 on the Organisations archive. Leave blank to use the CPT label.

fields.label: Organisations Archive Colour Space
fields.name: organisation_colour_space
fields.instructions: Sets the colour palette for the Organisation archive index.

fields.label: People Archive Heading
fields.name: person_archive_heading
fields.instructions: Override the h1 on the People archive. Leave blank to use the CPT label.

fields.label: People Archive Colour Space
fields.name: person_colour_space
fields.instructions: Sets the colour palette for the People archive index.

fields.label: Media Archive Heading
fields.name: media_item_archive_heading
fields.instructions: Override the h1 on the Media archive. Leave blank to use the CPT label.

fields.label: Media Archive Colour Space
fields.name: media_item_colour_space
fields.instructions: Sets the colour palette for the Media archive index.

fields.label: Events Archive Heading
fields.name: event_archive_heading
fields.instructions: Override the h1 on the Events archive. Leave blank to use the default 'Events'.

fields.label: Events Archive Colour Space
fields.name: event_colour_space
fields.instructions: Sets the colour palette for the Events archive index.

description: Heading overrides and colour space for each CPT archive index page.
